capabilities: glob
read
write
edit
bash
avatar
email
system
daemon
psyche

_comments.preset: Conductor doesn't need heavy reasoning. A fast, cheap model (tier:2 or tier:3) suffices — it's mostly orchestrating spawns, polling files, and formatting markdown. The avatars it spawns are the ones doing real verification work.
_comments.soul_delay: Set to 0 — conductor doesn't need introspection. It's a task runner, not a reflective agent.
capabilities: glob  — discover test.md files across the anatomy tree
read  — read test.md files, parse frontmatter, read avatar results
write — generate rollup INDEX.md and archive copies
edit  — minor adjustments to generated files
bash  — filesystem ops for cleanup (mv avatar workdirs)
avatar — spawn shallow avatars for each test scenario (the core mechanism)
email — inter-agent comms: receive completion signals from avatars, escalate failures
system — show (monitor own resources), nap (wait between polls)
daemon — optional: can use daemons for parallel aggregation if needed
psyche — pad management for tracking run state across turns
missing_capabilities: web_search — not needed for test orchestration
codex — conductor is ephemeral, doesn't accumulate knowledge
